headline: Q1 Earnings Highs And Lows: Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH) Vs The Rest Of The Consumer Discretionary - Travel and Vacation Providers Stocks
summary: The end of the earnings season is always a good time to take a step back and see who shined (and who didn’t). Let’s take a look at how consumer discretionary - travel and vacation providers stocks fared in Q1, starting with Norwegian Cruise Line (NYSE:NCLH).

headline: Carnival Earnings Are a Big Test for the Cruise Stocks Rally
summary: Cruise stocks have been on a tear recently, boosted by tumbling oil prices and hopes of an end to the Iran war.

headline: Carnival Earnings Due. Will Record Booking Trends Outpace Fuel Costs?
summary: Carnival's Q2 earnings on Tuesday are expected to detail booking momentum, fuel cost impact. CCL's stock performance trails this rival.
